pilot_signal_strength.evidence: 3/4 metrics survive L0 control; sparse probing partial r STRENGTHENED to -0.746 (suppression); GAM interaction p=3.1e-15 on 420 SAEs; full mediation for 2/4 metrics

hypothesis_survival.evidence: H1 SUPPORTED_WITH_CAVEATS (3/4 metrics pass, within-width matching fails); H2 SUPPORTED (with cosine-vs-dominance discrepancy); H3 STRONGLY_SUPPORTED; H5 CORRECTION_MINIMAL

path_to_full_result.evidence: Phase 1 and Phase 3 publication-ready. Phase 2 requires metric resolution and Gemma 2B access. Clear path for 3/4 contributions.

novelty.evidence: Novelty score 8/10. Zero prior art on mediation analysis for SAE evaluation, Rosenbaum bounds for ML interpretability, absorption on knowledge hierarchies.

resource_efficiency.evidence: Pilot completed in 16.1 minutes. Phase 1 is zero-GPU. Phase 3 reused SAEBench data. Only Phase 2 full run requires GPU (4-6h).

pilot_signal_strength.evidence: GAM interaction p=3.1e-15; R^2=0.693; phase boundary detected

path_to_full_result.evidence: Core analysis already complete. Thin as standalone contribution.

novelty.evidence: Novelty 7/10. Partial overlap with Chanin Figs 9b/9c and Feature Hedging.

pilot_signal_strength.evidence: 23-56% dominance-based absorption but 0% cosine-calibrated. Unresolved methodological discrepancy.

hypothesis_survival.evidence: H2 nominally supported but cosine-vs-dominance gap undermines confidence.

path_to_full_result.evidence: Cosine metric resolution, Gemma 2B access, super-absorber investigation all needed.

novelty.evidence: Novelty 8/10. Fills most explicitly called-for literature gap.

resource_efficiency.evidence: Most expensive component (4-6 GPU-hours). Requires gated model access.

hypothesis_survival.evidence: Untested. Theoretically plausible but high decorative-analogy risk.

path_to_full_result.evidence: Substantial implementation needed. Does not address blocking issues.

pilot_signal_strength.evidence: Activation condition not met. H1 was not falsified.

hypothesis_survival.evidence: Requires H1 AND H2 falsification. Neither occurred.

path_to_full_result.evidence: No viable path. Evidence contradicts deflationary narrative.

reasons: cand_causal_chain passed the critical go/no-go: 3/4 quality metrics retain |partial_r| > 0.2 after L0 control, with sparse probing F1 STRENGTHENING from -0.664 to -0.746 (suppression effect)
Full mediation detected for SCR (proportion mediated = 1.133) and RAVEL TPP (proportion mediated = 0.54), establishing the causal chain L0 -> Absorption -> Quality
Rosenbaum Gamma = 2.65 for TPP (strong robustness to unmeasured confounders)
420-SAE scaling surface shows highly significant width-L0 interaction (p=3.1e-15), phase boundary at L0~6-14
Cross-domain absorption detected (23-56% dominance-based) with 0% shuffled baseline, though cosine-calibrated metric discrepancy needs resolution
Taxonomy correction validates original 92.3% rate as genuine feature selectivity
Bradford Hill assessment: 3 strong, 5 moderate, 0 weak criteria -- moderate-to-strong causal support
Phase 1 and Phase 3 are publication-ready; Phase 2 requires additional work but is a strong third contribution
Pilot completed in 16.1 minutes total -- exceptional resource efficiency
next_actions: Proceed to full experiment execution for cand_causal_chain
Phase 1: Execute full versions of all 6 sub-tasks with seed sweeps (42/123/456)
Phase 2 CRITICAL: Investigate and resolve dominance-based vs cosine-calibrated absorption discrepancy
Phase 2: Attempt to obtain Gemma 2B HF token for proper cross-model comparison
Phase 3: Generate publication-quality figures from existing 420-SAE dataset
Phase 4: Report taxonomy validation as clean negative result
Begin writing: Phase 1 (confound resolution) and Phase 3 (scaling surface) sections are ready
key_risks: Phase 2 cosine-calibrated vs dominance-based discrepancy is unresolved -- must be addressed before cross-domain claims
Gemma 2B model access remains gated -- Phase 2 may be limited to GPT-2 Small
Within-width matching null results limit the strength of causal claims in Phase 1
Single architecture (Gemma 2B SAEs) limits generalizability of Phase 1 and Phase 3

sanity_checks.sunk_cost_check: No sunk cost bias -- cand_honest_audit dropped despite being fully planned because evidence contradicts it
sanity_checks.inconclusive_reason: Not applicable -- pilot evidence is clear and decisive
